questions.question: What animals are visible in this video clip?
questions.answer_key: Multiple cats, including brown/dark and white colored cats
questions.rationale: Main subjects are clearly identifiable across all frames

questions.question: What is the primary action occurring in this scene?
questions.answer_key: Cats are playing or interacting with each other on the floor
questions.rationale: Central action visible throughout the sequence of frames

questions.question: Where does this scene take place?
questions.answer_key: Inside a home, in a hallway or entryway near stairs
questions.rationale: Setting clearly established by visible architectural elements

questions.question: What furniture or structural elements are visible in the background?
questions.answer_key: Wooden staircase with railing and a dark wooden chair
questions.rationale: Key background objects that orient viewer to location

questions.question: How many cats appear to be present in this scene?
questions.answer_key: At least three or four cats of different colors
questions.rationale: Number of main subjects is important for scene comprehension
